rationale: The citing paper explicitly models brand screening (consideration) separately from preference using hierarchical Bayesian estimation, while the cited paper develops probabilistic subset-conjunctive screening and a two-stage consideration-choice model for heterogeneous consumers. This is a close methodological/theoretical overlap rather than a clearly incidental background mention, and the DOI match confirms an actual citation link. Given this plausible substantive use, it should be retained for full relation judgment.
